warnings.message: Missing 4/14 required vocab: видова пара (aspect pair — two verbs differing only in aspect), дієвідміна (verb conjugation class — I or II), двовидовий (biaspectual — verb that can be either aspect: атакувати), одновидовий (single-aspect — verb existing in only one aspect)
Plan expects 6 exercise(s) but content has 0 placeholders
